winners: Verified Agent Business — Enterprise ROI Calculator (99/110)
top_insight: METTLE-focused builds consistently score 98-105 (winners) while non-priority builds score 64-81, validating #1 priority focus and revealing clear product-market fit in swim coaching tools.

integration_candidates.integration_plan: Integrate as the core daily workflow tool for METTLE ARM (Athlete Relations Manager) — coaches use this 5x/week vs. meet tools 2x/month. Add Firestore sync, team library, and PDF export.
Deploy as the official meet day module within METTLE — real-time event tracking, warmup countdowns, results with PB detection. Integrate with Hy-Tek/Meet Manager for official times import.

integration_candidates.build: Verified Agent Business — Enterprise ROI Calculator
integration_candidates.integration_plan: Embed as the primary sales tool for enterprise prospects — prospects model their own ROI, self-qualify, and generate proposals. Add PDF export and lead capture.
Replace generic 'Request Demo' with interactive readiness assessment → personalized roadmap → beta application flow. Increases conversion by making coaches feel understood before they apply.

next_week_focus: Builders should prioritize: 1) Production integration of top METTLE winners (Practice Planner + Meet Day), 2) Verified Agent vertical-specific demos (Legal contract review, Security threat detection), 3) METTLE ↔️ athlete mobile app bridge for real-time notifications.

top_insight: METTLE dominance intensifies: 8 of 12 winners are METTLE tools scoring 94-105, completing full coach workflow (practice → relay → heat sheets → meet scoring → post-race analysis). Nova's shift from fabrication (66) to METTLE (101) yielded 35-point improvement, validating priority focus.

integration_candidates.integration_plan: Integrate as daily practice planning module — coaches use this 5x/week. Add Firestore sync for team libraries, template sharing, and PDF export of practice cards. This is the highest-leverage daily tool.

Deploy as live meet scoring module with win condition detection — critical for meet-day strategy. Integrate with Heat Sheet Generator for seamless meet workflow and add Hy-Tek data import for official times.
Integrate as retention analytics dashboard with automated win-back sequence generation. Connect to METTLE engagement data and trigger coach alerts when athletes hit high-risk thresholds.
Embed as value-based pricing calculator for enterprise sales — shifts conversation from cost savings to value creation. Add PDF export and CRM integration for proposal generation.

next_week_focus: Builders should prioritize: 1) Production integration of METTLE workflow trilogy (Practice Builder + Heat Sheet Generator + Meet Scorer), 2) METTLE mobile companion for athlete notifications and check-ins, 3) Verified Agent vertical demos with industry-specific ROI cases (legal, security, healthcare).
